tagline: Pay with anything. Receive USDC. Invisibly.

overview.flow: Customer signs CCTPv2 burn on Ethereum Sepolia → Iris v2 attestation (~30-90s Fast Transfer) → server admin wallet calls receiveMessage on Arc → merchant receives USDC
overview.uxPromise: Customer signs 2 txs (approve + depositForBurn), watches progress bar, merchant receives USDC on Arc
overview.rollback: v1.0 git tag preserves the prior BSC SwapRouter + PancakeSwap + CCTPv1/ADMIN_RELAY codebase. To rollback v2 issues: git revert the offending commit + Vercel redeploy (~5 min) since v1 code is no longer in tree as of Phase 06 full (commit at 2026-05-31).

SwapRouter.sol.entryFn: swapAndBridge(sessionId, grossUSDC, aigFee, amountInMax, poolFee, merchantBytes32, merchantAddr)

apiRoutes.POST /api/agent/execute: SSE stream — server-side CCTPv2 attestation poll + Arc mint. Pipeline anchored in ReadableStream.start() for Vercel serverless function lifetime safety. Route segment config: maxDuration=60, runtime=nodejs, dynamic=force-dynamic.

libModules.lib/payment-flow-v2.ts: usePaymentFlowV2 client hook — switchChain→Sepolia, USDC.approve(TokenMessenger), TokenMessengerV2.depositForBurn(7-arg Fast Transfer), POST burn tx to /api/agent/execute
libModules.lib/cctp-abi.ts: minimal ERC20 approve + CCTPv2 TokenMessengerV2 depositForBurn (7-arg) ABI
libModules.lib/cctp.ts: pollAttestationV2 (Iris v2 endpoint) + receiveMessage (Arc MessageTransmitter, non-blocking receipt)

pages./pay/[id]: PaymentPageV2 — wagmi connect (sepolia-only), Pay button, PaymentProgressBar driven by SSE
pages./dashboard: Merchant dashboard — Pencil UI, QR generator, real-time payment feed, points tier, stat cards

tables.payment_sessions: session_id (unique), status, bridge_mode, merchant_wallet, customer_wallet, target_usdc, swap_params (JSONB)

external.Circle CCTP: Domain 7 (Arc) — TokenMessenger.depositForBurn → MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage; attestation via Circle API
external.Arc Network: Settlement chain (chain ID 212) — USDC mint destination

CCTPv2 Fast Transfer (only).flow: client approve(USDC->TokenMessengerV2) + depositForBurn(amount, 26, mintRecipient, USDC, destCaller=0, maxFee=amount/1000, minFinality=1000) → server pollAttestationV2(iris-api-sandbox.circle.com/v2/messages/0?transactionHash=tx) → server admin wallet receiveMessage(message, attestation) on Arc MessageTransmitter
CCTPv2 Fast Transfer (only).fee: ~1bps protocol fee deducted at mint (merchant receives amount - ~0.01% on standard route)

paymentInitiation: Merchant generates /pay/<sessionId>?merchant=<arc-addr>&amount=<usdc> URL (QR or share link)
Customer opens URL -> PaymentPageV2 renders Connect button (wagmi injected) -> switchChain to Sepolia (11155111)
paymentExecution: Client POST /api/agent/execute with burn txHash -> SSE stream
Server emit swap_executing -> bridging -> pollAttestationV2 -> receiveMessage on Arc -> emit confirmed(arcTxHash)

keyDesignDecisions.sseInReadableStreamStart: /api/agent/execute pipeline runs INSIDE ReadableStream.start() callback so Vercel serverless function lifetime ties to controller.close(); fire-and-forget runPipeline-after-return was cut at ~2-3s on prod
keyDesignDecisions.nonBlockingArcReceipt: receiveMessage returns Arc txHash as soon as writeContract resolves; waitForTransactionReceipt fires detached. SSE confirmed event means "tx submitted" not "tx mined"
keyDesignDecisions.cctpV2FastTransfer: maxFee = amountWei/1000n (>0 required) + minFinalityThreshold=1000 enables Fast attestation (~30-90s) vs Standard finalized wait (~15min)
keyDesignDecisions.irisV2Endpoint: pollAttestationV2 queries /v2/messages/{sourceDomain}?transactionHash — returns BOTH raw message + attestation; v1 extract-from-receipt + poll-by-messageHash chain replaced
keyDesignDecisions.clientSideOnly: Payment + dashboard pages are "use client" — wagmi needs browser env

security.privateKeys: AIG_ADMIN_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY env-only, server-side only; required for receiveMessage on Arc
security.inputValidation: /api/agent/execute validates sessionId (string), swapTxHash (/^0x[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$/), merchantWallet (/^0x[0-9a-fA-F]{40}$/), targetUSDC (positive number)
security.txFinality: confirmed SSE event = tx submitted (mint mines on Arc asynchronously); merchant should reconcile via dashboard polling

envVars.removed_phase06_full: BRIDGE_BACKEND, NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGE_BACKEND, BRIDGE_MODE, BSC_TESTNET_RPC_URL, USDC_ADDRESS_BSC_TESTNET, WBNB_ADDRESS_BSC, CCTP_TOKEN_MESSENGER_BSC, PANCAKESWAP_V3_*, SWAP_ROUTER_ADDRESS_BSC, NEXT_PUBLIC_SWAP_ROUTER_ADDRESS_BSC, ARC_CCTP_DOMAIN_ID, AIG_REVENUE_POOL_ADDRESS, TEST_PRIVATE_KEY, CIRCLE_ATTESTATION_API

external.Circle CCTPv2 (active): Sepolia source domain=0, Arc dest domain=26. Iris sandbox https://iris-api-sandbox.circle.com/v2
external.Arc Network: Settlement chain — USDC mint destination via MessageTransmitter 0xE737e5cEBEEBa77EFE34D4aa090756590b1CE275
external.Vercel: Frontend hosting; serverless function maxDuration=60 needed on /api/agent/execute for SSE pipeline
